page_content:
Track 2: B.A. in Studio Art with Advanced Specialization. This track is restricted to students admitted by competitive portfolio review, and is aimed at students who envision graduate study or professional careers in art. Students accepted into this track will complete, in addition to the requirements for Track 1, a 12 credit advanced specialization in speciﬁc media areas, including ARTT481 Advanced Specialization Seminar. Areas of specialization include: Digital Media, Painting, Printmaking, Sculpture, and Intermedia. Credit requirements: 48 credits listed in Track 1 plus 12 credits in Advanced Specializations, for a total of 60 credits.

Track 3: B.A. in Studio Art with a concentration in Graphic Design.
